task.title: Review configuration management in sync-project
task.description: Complete the following task: Review configuration management in sync-project. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT touch .env or any credential files.
Do NOT change the database schema.
success_criteria: New functionality is covered by tests.

steps.thought: Given the constraints, I should start by checking the allowed directories.
Let me review the model definition.
Let me profile this to understand performance.
I should check the utility functions.
steps.observation:
# sync Configuration
# Generated by setup wizard

[database]
host = "localhost"
port = 5432
name = "sync-project_db"
user = "app_user"
pool_size = 10

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
sync_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true

steps.thought: Let me build the project to check for errors.
Let me verify the database state.
